h1.visual_description: Bold, serif font, significantly larger than body text, prefixed with a single uppercase letter (e.g., 'A', 'B').

h2.visual_description: Bold, serif font, slightly larger than body text, prefixed with an alphanumeric section code (e.g., 'B.1', 'B.2').

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Bullet point list item starting with a bolded key term or phrase followed by a colon.
In-text citation, rendered in blue text, following the (Author et al., Year) format.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-year parenthetical citations with blue hyperlinking.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: No headers, footers, or page numbers are visible in this specific page segment.
